subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-01-25
subcodes.first_line: In all our affairs we must use common sense. God has bestowed upon all of us reason, that we might use it in our daily work and not hide it in the drawer.
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @conduct in finance and business, @stories; anecdotes, @wisdom [hikmat], @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
